_comment: Example Claude Desktop configuration. To use the FDC MCP server with Claude Desktop: 1) build the project (npm install && npm run build), 2) add this server block to your Claude Desktop config file (macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json, Windows: %APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json), 3) replace ABSOLUTE_PATH_TO_FDC_MCP with the full path to your local clone, 4) restart Claude Desktop. The server's 4 tools will appear in the tools picker.
